'''Trista Orlanis''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] with a slender build and black hair. She attended the [[University of Agamar]] and in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] accompanied [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Anki Pace]] on an archaeological dig to [[Bimmiel/Legends|Bimmiel]] as a grad student. She developed an interest in [[Ganner Rhysode]] when he and [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] arrived on Bimmiel.

During Corran and Ganner's rescue [[Mission to Bimmiel|mission]], Trista [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] the ''[[Dalliance]]'' and dropped a [[killscent]] bomb on the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] encampment to trigger a [[slashrat]] infestation, in the hopes that it would wipe out the Yuuzhan Vong slave and search operations. The mission was a success.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' {{1st}}
